Comparative study of GPT-OSS vs contemporary open models (arXiv:2508.12461), Table II — NOTE: this paper's GPT-OSS-120B scores are LOWER than its GPT-OSS-20B scores on every metric, contradicting the official OpenAI/Epoch/AA-sourced numbers already in this catalog where 120B > 20B; likely a harness/config issue in the paper, kept as a distinct source rather than altered
